---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: AyehBlk
---

## What are you trying to do?
<!-- Describe the task or workflow you're working on -->


## Why doesn't the current version support this well?
<!-- What's missing or inconvenient about the current approach? -->


## How would you like it to work?
<!-- Describe your ideal experience — even a rough sketch is helpful -->


## Which module does this affect?
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Data Acquisition (Search, Download, Upload)
- [ ] Data Library (Preview, Gene ID Conversion)
- [ ] Dataset Pooling (Merging, Batch Correction)
- [ ] Quality Check (PCA, Library Sizes, Distributions)
- [ ] Export
- [ ] SRA (Run Tables, FASTQ Downloads)
- [ ] Dashboard UI/UX (general)
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

## How important is this for your workflow?
- [ ] Critical — I can't complete my analysis without it
- [ ] Important — I have a workaround but it's inconvenient
- [ ] Nice to have — would make things smoother

## Example use case
<!-- If possible, give a concrete example from your research -->
<!-- e.g., "I'm studying X and I need to combine datasets from Y and Z, but..." -->


## Additional context
<!-- Any other information, links, papers, or screenshots -->
